title: [Nyessem, Gardens West]
description: Crisscrossing paths are placed between rows of Nyessem crops in this humid room.  A suspended fruit and herb garden hangs from a trellis system, with its tendrils and blooms forming a prominent canopy that partially obscures the metal pipes bolted to the ceiling, which lead to both a multi-tiered white stone fountain and a gem-studded glass greenhouse.  Vibrant rose bushes decoratively occupy stone troughs along the walls.  A preserved arbor-lined opening leads deeper into the gardens.
